holdings.infoBox: LSAT is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fortinet stock at 5.40%, Iridium Communications at 5.03%, DaVita at 3.99%, Harley-Davidson at 3.82%, and Southwest Airlines Co. at 3.72%.

overview.description: The Leadershares Alphafactor Tactical Focused ETF (LSAT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively-managed to invest in US stocks selected by multiple factors. The fund employs a risk overlay to overweight money-market securities during riskier periods. LSAT was launched on Oct 27, 2020 and is issued by Redwood.
